Home / Services / Stone Masonry

Stone Masonry

Timeless elegance and unmatched durability with natural stone.

Stone masonry brings a touch of natural beauty and enduring strength to any property. We specialize in the installation of various stone types, including limestone, granite, sandstone, and flagstone. From retaining walls and patios to fireplaces and facades, we create stunning stone features that enhance your home's aesthetic appeal and value. Our stone masons are skilled in traditional and modern techniques, ensuring precise cuts, secure settings, and seamless integration. We understand the importance of proper drainage and structural support, especially in Houston's fluctuating temperatures and heavy rainfall. We also offer stone repair and restoration services to preserve the beauty and integrity of existing stone structures. We can help you select the perfect stone to complement your home's style and create a unique, lasting impression.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Stone Selection - Choose from a wide variety of natural stones to match your design.
  2. 02 Step 2: Precise Cutting and Shaping - We cut and shape each stone to ensure a perfect fit.
  3. 03 Step 3: Expert Installation - Our masons meticulously set each stone for maximum stability.
  4. 04 Step 4: Sealing and Finishing - We seal and finish the stone to protect it from the elements.

Benefits

  • Natural Beauty and Elegance
  • Exceptional Durability
  • Increased Property Value
  • Weather Resistance

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the best type of stone for a patio in Houston?

Flagstone and limestone are popular choices for patios in Houston due to their durability and natural beauty. We can advise on specific stone types based on your budget and aesthetic preferences.

How do I maintain stone masonry?

Regular cleaning with a mild detergent and water is typically sufficient. Sealing the stone can also help protect it from staining and water damage. We can provide specific maintenance recommendations based on the type of stone used.

Can you repair damaged stone?

Yes, we offer stone repair and restoration services. We can repair cracks, chips, and other damage to restore the beauty and integrity of your stone structures.

Get a Free Estimate
